revision.comment: Allow |position= to be passed through to {{Sister project}}, to match all the other {{Commons}} & {{Wiki...}} templates
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=EB1911_poster here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

select an article title from: [[:Wikisource:1911 Encyclopædia Britannica|Wikisource:1911 ''Encyclopædia Britannica'']]}}}}{{#if:{{{1|}}}||{{preview warning|1={{tl|EB1911 poster}}: article title required; select an article title from: [[:Wikisource:1911 Encyclopædia Britannica|Wikisource:1911 ''Encyclopædia Britannica'']]}} }}{{#if:{{{1|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|0||}} }}{{documentation}} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating the template EB1911 poster with no parameters]] }} \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
